local_results.title: The Fish & Bone
local_results.description: Trendy, warm pet shop stocking a wide selection of dog and cat food and treats as well as toys and accessories.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff and great variety of pet supplies!"

local_results.title: Uncommon Paws
local_results.description: Family-owned shop specializing in handmade leashes, collars, and other gear for dogs, plus toys and treats.
local_results.user_review: "Extremely friendly owners with high quality, handmade leashes/collars/etc."

local_results.title: Pet Supplies Plus Portland
local_results.address: 91 Auburn St Ste M, Portland, ME 04103
local_results.description: Food & supplies for small home pets. Chain carrying natural & U.S.-made pet supplies, plus services such as grooming & adoption.
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful, knowledgeable staff and a great selection of dog and cat food."

local_results.title: Petco
local_results.address: 220 Maine Mall Rd, South Portland, ME 04106
local_results.description: Retailer dedicated to pet supplies. Chain with pet food & supplies such as toys, beds & pet technology products, plus medication.
local_results.user_review: "They offer a solid selection of the products our animals use and prefer."

local_results.title: Pets On Point and The Dog Wash Etc.
local_results.description: Self-serve dog-washing station that also sells pet foods, toys and treats.
local_results.user_review: "Pets on Point are always, friendly, knowledgeable, and all around fantastic."

local_results.title: The Animal House
local_results.description: Pet supply and food store, including all-natural items alongside toys.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent selection and very reasonable prices."

local_results.title: Pets On Point
local_results.user_review: "The staff are phenomenal and the selection of food and dog treats is great."

local_results.title: General Store For Pets
local_results.user_review: "Best prices, best selection, and beautiful staff!"

local_results.title: PetSmart
local_results.address: 700 Gallery Blvd Unit B, Scarborough, ME 04074
local_results.description: Mainstay for pets & related supplies. Chain featuring a range of pets, supplies & food (most offer grooming, boarding & other services).
local_results.user_review: "Everything I needed for our new family member and helpful staff."

local_results.title: Pet Supplies Plus South Portland
local_results.description: Food & supplies for small home pets. Chain carrying natural & U.S.-made pet supplies, plus services such as grooming & adoption.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff and a great selection of quality pet products!"

local_results.title: Pet Quarters
local_results.description: Pet store offering a range of products for dogs, cats, and other animals, plus fish tanks.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, great selection of dog food"

local_results.title: Pet Supplies Plus South Portland Grooming
local_results.user_review: "My dog with fur gets a baths and a nail trims."

local_results.description: Pet store in Oak Hill Plaza offering grooming services.

local_results.title: Pet Quarters
local_results.user_review: "Good selection, super kind & helpful staff"

local_results.title: Easy Aquariums - Westbrook
local_results.description: Aquarium, reptile and pet shop featuring tanks stocked with saltwater and freshwater fish and other aquatic life.
local_results.user_review: "We’ve gotten lots of fish here and two ball pythons and a blue tongue skink."

local_results.title: Port Grooming & Pet Care Center
local_results.description: Relaxed shop for pooches and cats selling food, supplies and treats as well as doing grooming and self-serve bathing.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent service and prices"

local_results.title: You Dirty Dog--Self Serve Dog Wash
local_results.description: Self-service option for pet owners to wash their dogs, plus grooming services like nail clipping.
local_results.user_review: "Easy dog wash stations with perfectly placed supplies"

local_results.title: PetSmart
local_results.description: Mainstay for pets & related supplies. Chain featuring a range of pets, supplies & food (most offer grooming, boarding & other services).
local_results.user_review: "Always find what I need for my pets, friendly, helpful staff."

local_results.title: The Black Dog General Store - Portland
local_results.description: Casual clothing & gift retailer. Retailer selling casualwear, accessories & gifts with its signature dog logo for men, women & kids.
local_results.user_review: "A little pricey but quality clothing."
